title: SMEMBERS
description: Returns all members of a set.
complexity: O(N) where N is the set cardinality.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

codeExamples.description: Foundational: Retrieve all members of a set using SMEMBERS (returns unordered collection, useful for iterating all set members)

intro:
Returns all the members of the set value stored at `key`.

This has the same effect as running [`SINTER`]() with one argument `key`.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Returns all the members of the set value stored at `key`.

This has the same effect as running [`SINTER`]() with one argument `key`.

sections.title: Examples
Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): an array with all the members of the set.

**RESP3:**

[Set reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#sets): a set with all the members of the set.
